creator: oliver.fromme@heim3.tu-clausthal.de
text:
I have submitted a new FreeBSD port (category "audio"):
   ftp.freebsd.org:/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/tosha-0.05.port.tar.gz
"tosha" is a tool to read CD audio tracks through the
SCSI bus.  It supports CD-ROM and CD-R drives of all
major vendors.  It has been tested with 2.1.7, 2.2.1 and
several 3.0 snapshots, and it's expected to work with any
FreeBSD version >= 2.1.7.
